models.name: Theory of Constraints
models.one_line: Throughput is set by the single binding constraint; optimise there, ignore the rest.

models.name: Second-Order Thinking
models.one_line: Ask 'and then what?' — the third hop is where mispricing lives.

models.name: Inversion
models.one_line: Solve the failure case first; avoid what kills the goal rather than chasing it.

models.name: Reflexivity
models.one_line: Observation changes the system — a map accurate enough to trade on gets arbitraged away.

models.name: Red Queen / Creative Destruction
models.one_line: Every rent decays; every choke breeds bypass; date-stamp all concentration bets.

models.name: Margin of Safety
models.one_line: Build buffer against error; the dangerous quadrant is high conviction + thin margin.

models.name: Circle of Competence
models.one_line: Know the edge boundary; delegate out-of-circle rather than trusting your own judgment.

models.name: Survivorship Bias
models.one_line: Study failures as carefully as successes — the graveyard holds the most useful data.

models.name: Regression to the Mean
models.one_line: Extreme outcomes revert; the base rate always reasserts.

models.name: Goodhart / Gresham
models.one_line: When a measure becomes a target, it ceases to be a good measure.

models.name: Critical Mass / Slowly-then-all-at-once
models.one_line: Forming windows have a flip threshold; name the exact event that crosses it.

models.name: Scale Laws
models.one_line: What works at 1× breaks at 10×; ask the question before you need the answer.
